summary.lv: GASTRO CENTRS partneris meklē Mid-level Backend Engineer (Java/Spring) integrācijas servisa izstrādei starp iekšējo platformu un ārējo partneru sistēmām. Hibrīds darbs, atalgojums €4000–5000 mēnesī.
summary.en: GASTRO's tech partner is hiring a mid-level Backend Engineer (Java/Spring) to build and maintain an integration service connecting the internal platform with external partner systems, offering €4,000–5,000/month.
